definition: surfaceome membership confidence; higher is better
main_limitation: Membership confidence within admitted Core+Probable universe; not direct antigen density.

definition: tumor expression and prevalence; higher is better
main_limitation: Bulk RNA; no malignant epithelial isolation.

definition: on-target/off-tumor risk; higher is worse and is subtracted
main_limitation: High-worse off-tumor risk is subtracted; risk form is sensitivity-tested.
HPA bulk IHC lacks antibody-level and patient-level membrane fields.

definition: tumor-cell specificity versus TME; higher is better; optional in primary
main_limitation: No processed annotated gastric scRNA matrix admitted into the score; not counted in the primary score.

definition: topology, extracellular accessibility, and isoform confidence; higher is better
main_limitation: Topology/gene-level isoform annotations do not resolve CLDN18.2 or FGFR2b expression.
